# ✅ Node.js (백엔드용)
OPENAI_API_KEY=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
PORT=3174
# Kakao
KAKAO_CLIENT_ID=596902ef81ead1abdbee6f309850360b
KAKAO_CLIENT_SECRET=Q6mCT1bWLpSWKupVulNNzNsLpvWdBblV
KAKAO_CALLBACK_URL=https://lingora.chat/auth/kakao/callback
# Google
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=705602809572-4vg2p842kbbogi355jsees4djno4p3hr.apps.googleusercontent.com
GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=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
GOOGLE_TRANSLATE_API_KEY=AIzaSyDYhZEmT28j-RpGVoVTzoc3o-AsehaZn04
GOOGLE_CALLBACK_URL=https://lingora.chat/auth/google/callback
JWT_SECRET=MrO_SUPER_SECRET_please_change_to_a_long_random_string_98c7a31
# Redis
REDIS_URL=redis://127.0.0.1:6379

# JWT (스레드/손님창 토큰용) — 기존 JWT_SECRET과 별개로 사용
JWT_KEY=REPLACE_WITH_LONG_RANDOM_KEY_32C+

VITE_SOCKET_URL=wss://lingora.chat/socket.io

# 서버


pwsh ./scan_all.ps1 -Out ".\mro_c2c_audio_snapshot.json"


npm run build
$env:PORT="3174"; node server.js
cloudflared tunnel --config C:\Users\USER\.cloudflared\config.yml run lingora-tunnel





npx serve dist
